<!-- markdownlint-disable-file MD041 -->
<!--
  PR Title format: <gitmoji> <type>(<scope>): <short description>

  Examples:
    ✨ feat(terraform): add azuredevops naming module
    🐛 fix(ci): correct label sync token permissions
    📝 docs(readme): update installation instructions
    💥 feat(api)!: remove deprecated endpoints

  Gitmoji quick reference:
    ✨  feat       🐛  fix        📝  docs       💄  style
    ♻️  refactor   ⚡  perf       ✅  test        📦  build
    👷  ci         🔧  chore      ⏪  revert      🔒  security
    💥  breaking change (append ! after type/scope in title)
-->

## Description

<!-- What does this PR do? Why is it needed? Link any related issues. -->

Closes #<!-- issue number -->

## Type of Change

<!-- Mark all that apply with [x] -->

- [ ] ✨ `feat` — New feature
- [ ] 🐛 `fix` — Bug fix
- [ ] 📝 `docs` — Documentation only
- [ ] 💄 `style` — Formatting / whitespace (no logic change)
- [ ] ♻️ `refactor` — Code change that is neither a fix nor a feature
- [ ] ⚡ `perf` — Performance improvement
- [ ] ✅ `test` — Adding or updating tests
- [ ] 📦 `build` — Build system or external dependency changes
- [ ] 👷 `ci` — CI/CD configuration changes
- [ ] 🔧 `chore` — Maintenance, tooling, configuration
- [ ] 🔒 `security` — Security fix or hardening
- [ ] ⏪ `revert` — Revert a previous commit
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (append `!` after type/scope in PR title)

## Scope

<!-- What component, module, or area does this change affect? -->

Scope: `<!-- e.g. terraform, ci, labels, docs, naming, workflows -->`

## Changes Made

<!-- Bullet-point summary of what changed -->

-

## Testing

<!-- How was this tested? -->

- [ ] Tested locally
- [ ] Unit / integration tests updated or added
- [ ] No testing required (docs / chore only)

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) format with gitmoji and type/scope
- [ ] Appropriate labels applied
- [ ] Self-review completed
- [ ] No secrets or credentials included
- [ ] Breaking changes documented (if applicable)
